headline: Wall Street Bulls Look Optimistic About Newmont (NEM): Should You Buy?
summary: According to the average brokerage recommendation (ABR), one should invest in Newmont (NEM). It is debatable whether this highly sought-after metric is effective because Wall Street analysts' recommendations tend to be overly optimistic. Would it be worth investing in the stock?

headline: Here's How to Play Newmont Stock Before Q2 Earnings Release
summary: NEM heads into Q2 earnings with higher gold prices offset by lower production and rising costs. Margins are expected to be lower Q/Q.
